Package org.key_project.exploration

Class ExplorationExtension

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.exploration.ExplorationExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, ProofDisposedListener
public class ExplorationExtension extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, ProofDisposedListener
Entry point for the Proof Exploration Extension.

  • Method Details

    • getContextActions

      public @NonNull List<Action> getContextActions(@NonNull KeYMediator mediator, @NonNull ContextMenuKind kind, @NonNull Object underlyingObject)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      Parameters:
      mediator - the window of the main menu
      kind - the type of context menu
      underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction

    • getToolbar

      public @NonNull JToolBar getToolbar(MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
      A toolbar which will be embedded into the main window.s
      Specified by:
      getToolbar in interface KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the parent of the toolbar
      Returns:
      non-null

    • getPanels

      public @NonNull Collection<TabPanel> getPanels(@NonNull MainWindow window, @NonNull KeYMediator mediator)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
      Initialization and return of the sub components.

      Called before any other method; can be used to construct the UI.

      Specified by:
      getPanels in interface KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
      Parameters:
      window - parent of this extension
      mediator - the current mediator

      public @NonNull List<Action> getMainMenuActions(@NonNull MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getMainMenuActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the window of the main menu
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
